name: Iso11783PDDSetLogTrigger
title: Iso11783PDDSetLogTrigger
syntax: long Iso11783PDDSetLogTrigger( dword ecuHandle, dword command, ulong ddi, ulong elNum, ulong value );
description: A measurement command can be executed with this function. It can be used in the callback function Iso11783PDDOnDefaultLogRequest to activate the default logging.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU, must previously has been created with Iso11783CreateECU.

parameters.name: command
parameters.description: Measurement command: 4: Time Interval 5: Distance Interval 6: Minimum within Threshold 7: Maximum within Threshold 8: Change Threshold

parameters.name: Minimum within ThresholdMaximum within ThresholdChange Threshold

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
